context: Tests whether the agent writes a complete RSpec spec for a service object following the rspec-service-testing patterns: described_class, subject, shared contexts for invalid inputs, and explicit assertions on the { success:, response: } envelope.

checklist.name: Spec file created
checklist.description: A spec file is created at spec/services/notification_dispatch_service_spec.rb

checklist.name: described_class used
checklist.description: The spec uses described_class instead of hard-coding NotificationDispatchService

checklist.name: Missing user test
checklist.description: A test case covers a nil user and asserts success: false with a message matching 'user is required'

checklist.name: Blank message test
checklist.description: A test case covers a blank message and asserts success: false with a message matching 'message is required'

checklist.name: Invalid channel test
checklist.description: A test case passes an invalid channel value and asserts success: false

checklist.name: in_app success path
checklist.description: A test case covers the in_app channel, stubs or verifies user.notifications.create!, and asserts success: true with correct user_id and channel

checklist.name: email success path
checklist.description: A test case covers the email channel and verifies that UserMailer.notification_email is called (with deliver_later or enqueued)

checklist.name: Unexpected error test
checklist.description: A test case stubs send_notification (or a dependency) to raise StandardError and asserts success: false with the generic error message

checklist.name: Response envelope shape asserted
checklist.description: Tests assert on result[:success] and result[:response] keys — not on raw return values

checklist.name: RSpec structure quality
checklist.description: Spec uses describe/context/it structure, not a flat list of it blocks. Each context block has a meaningful description

checklist.name: frozen_string_literal header
checklist.description: The spec file starts with # frozen_string_literal: true

checklist.name: No implementation changes
checklist.description: The service implementation file is not modified — only the spec is produced
